see_evidence: Each incident becomes a learning opportunity — patterns stored in knowledge repositories
Promote successful patterns into reusable playbooks that next projects can inherit
Self-healing risk: sidecar generator stops after packaging — never repairs, only surfaces
trigger_classes_implemented: IC_FAILURE: threshold=2, fires on repeat IC interrupt conditions
TOOL_FAILURE: threshold=2, fires on repeat tool routing failures
SEE_GAP: threshold=2, fires when SEE returns 0 results twice
AMENDMENT_CANDIDATE: threshold=1, fires on every W3 amendment proposal
SUCCESS_PATTERN: threshold=1, fires on every W5 pattern promotion

validation_tests.test: T1 direct generate IC_FAILURE — README + evidence + index
T3 AMENDMENT_CANDIDATE fires at threshold=1 with proposal
T4 SIDECAR_BLOCKED_RECEIPT on write failure — no exception
T5 ledger summary — all classes tracked
T6 SHA integrity on generated index

new_capabilities: CAPABILITY: All 5 trigger classes auto-generate named sidecar bundles at configurable thresholds
CAPABILITY: Amendment proposals and success patterns bundled automatically from W3/W5 output
CAPABILITY: SIDECAR_BLOCKED_RECEIPT written when writes fail — never silently drops evidence
CAPABILITY: ThresholdManager tracks per-class per-chunk counts — fires once per threshold crossing
CAPABILITY: SIDECAR_GENERATION_LEDGER_v1.jsonl records all generated sidecars for audit query
CAPABILITY: generate, record, summary, query CLI subcommands — integrates with stage runner
